messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: Nothing stops a single test file quietly becoming the suite's next 10-second pole
What it solves: THE ASK. The intake's own fourth success criterion. BL-375/376/377 fix today's three poles;
this is what stops them growing back, or a fourth file becoming the next one.
How it works: A file over the budget fails the guard

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-378 - Nothing stops a single test file quietly becoming the suite's next 10-second pole is complete.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-378 ✅ done — Nothing stops a single test file quietly becoming the suite's next 10-second pole
